questions.question: What is the total market value of account ACC-0042?
questions.failure_mode_silver: Silver stores raw source account keys (C-XXXXXX, PORT-XXXX, FND-XXXX). There is no canonical account_id in POSITIONS_INTEGRATED, so filtering by 'ACC-0042' returns no data.
questions.ground_truth_description: Total market value of account ACC-0042 (George Group Trust)

silver.sql:
WITH __positions AS (
  SELECT
    account_ref,
    position_date,
    market_value
  FROM gsf_demo.silver.positions_integrated
)
SELECT
  account_ref,
  MIN(position_date) AS start_date,
  MAX(position_date) AS end_date,
  SUM(market_value) AS total_market_value
FROM __positions
WHERE
  account_ref = 'ACC-0042'
GROUP BY
  account_ref
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 75c18600-c715-44e8-939b-60aa514c2238)
;

gold.sql:
WITH __position AS (
  SELECT
    account_id,
    market_value
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_position
), __account AS (
  SELECT
    account_id,
    account_name
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_account
)
SELECT
  a.account_id,
  a.account_name,
  SUM(p.market_value) AS total_market_value
FROM __position AS p
JOIN __account AS a
  ON p.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE
  a.account_id = 'ACC-0042'
GROUP BY
  a.account_id,
  a.account_name
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 3fee091e-1377-4f97-a374-aead22e27c43)
;

questions.question: What is the total quantity of Rasmussen LLC plc held across all accounts?
questions.failure_mode_silver: POSITIONS_INTEGRATED has no security_name column — Cortex cannot resolve a name lookup. Even if it filters by identifier, SEC-0018 (RLP) is absent from BRONZE.SECURITY_MASTER_STUB, so security_master_id is NULL and any join-based lookup returns zero rows.
questions.ground_truth_description: Total quantity of Rasmussen LLC plc (ticker: RLP, SEC-0018) across all accounts

silver.sql:
WITH __positions AS (
  SELECT
    security_ref,
    position_date,
    quantity
  FROM gsf_demo.silver.positions_integrated
)
SELECT
  SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity,
  MIN(position_date) AS start_date,
  MAX(position_date) AS end_date
FROM __positions
WHERE
  security_ref = 'Rasmussen LLC plc'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 68e9a645-af50-401e-82a7-c4118f694348)
;

gold_naive.sql:
WITH __positions_naive AS (
  SELECT
    security_master_id,
    position_date,
    total_quantity
  FROM gsf_demo.gold_naive.positions_naive
)
SELECT
  SUM(total_quantity) AS total_quantity,
  MIN(position_date) AS start_date,
  MAX(position_date) AS end_date
FROM __positions_naive
WHERE
  security_master_id = 'Rasmussen LLC plc'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: cc97061f-97d5-46ee-b496-36e8e822f241)
;

gold.sql:
WITH __position AS (
  SELECT
    security_id,
    quantity
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_position
), __security AS (
  SELECT
    security_id,
    security_name
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_security
)
SELECT
  SUM(p.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM __position AS p
JOIN __security AS s
  ON p.security_id = s.security_id
WHERE
  s.security_name = 'Rasmussen LLC plc'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 628a286a-aef9-40f3-af0a-e531f0039bcd)
;

questions.question: What is the total market value of all positions?
questions.failure_mode_silver: POSITIONS_INTEGRATED.price blends custodian closing prices (Topaz), PM evaluated prices (Emerald), and NAV-based prices (Ruby). The total is internally consistent but computed from three different pricing methodologies that would never appear together in any system of record.
questions.ground_truth_description: Total market value across all 4,886 DW positions (custodian closing price basis)

bronze.sql:
WITH __topaz_positions AS (
  SELECT
    as_of_dt,
    mkt_val
  FROM gsf_demo.bronze.topaz_positions
)
SELECT
  MIN(as_of_dt) AS start_date,
  MAX(as_of_dt) AS end_date,
  SUM(mkt_val) AS total_market_value
FROM __topaz_positions

;

questions.question: What is the total unrealized loss across all positions with a loss greater than $10,000?
questions.failure_mode_silver: POSITIONS_INTEGRATED.unrealized_gl is NULL for all Ruby-sourced rows (22% of the table). Any filter on unrealized_gl silently excludes those positions. Additionally, three different column names map to 'unrealized gain/loss' across the source schemas — Cortex may not recognize the concept in all three.
questions.ground_truth_description: Sum of unrealized_gain_loss for all positions where value < -$10,000

bronze.sql:
WITH __topaz_positions AS (
  SELECT
    unrlzd_gl
  FROM gsf_demo.bronze.topaz_positions

SELECT
  SUM(unrlzd_gl) AS total_unrealized_loss
FROM __topaz_positions
WHERE
  unrlzd_gl < -10000

;

;

questions.question: What is the total quantity of Fixed Income securities held across all portfolios?
questions.failure_mode_silver: POSITIONS_INTEGRATED contains Topaz lot-level rows (LOT-* record_ids) alongside Emerald/Ruby position-level rows (POS-*, NAV-*). Grain is mixed and invisible — COUNT queries overcount Topaz positions, and any query treating one row as one position returns a lot fragment instead of the full position value. The observable symptom: a list query and a count query for the same question return different cardinalities with no error.
questions.ground_truth_description: Total quantity of Fixed Income securities at position grain (DW_POSITION)

silver.sql:
WITH __positions AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    position_date,
    quantity
  FROM gsf_demo.silver.positions_integrated
)
SELECT
  SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity,
  MIN(position_date) AS start_date,
  MAX(position_date) AS end_date
FROM __positions
WHERE
  asset_class = 'Fixed Income'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 82e34a8e-1307-4f35-a269-ac20df0ac148)
;

gold_naive.sql:
WITH __positions_naive AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    total_quantity
  FROM gsf_demo.gold_naive.positions_naive
)
SELECT
  SUM(total_quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM __positions_naive
WHERE
  asset_class = 'Fixed Income'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: e15ccd2d-a7ec-4d87-bb46-e5a2588a4343)
;

gold.sql:
WITH __position AS (
  SELECT
    security_id,
    quantity
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_position
), __security AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    security_id
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_security
)
SELECT
  SUM(p.quantity) AS total_quantity_fixed_income
FROM __position AS p
JOIN __security AS s
  ON p.security_id = s.security_id
WHERE
  s.asset_class = 'Fixed Income'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 5fd63660-7ed3-4e4b-bca0-9094eb4aecf7)
;

questions.question: How many positions exist as of December 31, 2024?
questions.failure_mode_silver: Topaz uses AS_OF_DT (settlement date), Emerald uses positionDate (trade date), and Ruby uses nav_date (NAV strike date). At year-end these dates can fall on different calendar days. The ETL silently chose one convention — the column looks normalized but the semantic distinction between date types is lost.
questions.ground_truth_description: Count of positions in DW_POSITION with position_date = 2024-12-31 (trade-date basis)

bronze.sql:
WITH __topaz_positions AS (
  SELECT
    lot_id,
    as_of_dt
  FROM gsf_demo.bronze.topaz_positions
)
SELECT
  COUNT(lot_id) AS num_positions
FROM __topaz_positions
WHERE
  as_of_dt = '2024-12-31'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 2dbb0560-36dc-45ff-8c38-114387b3969e)
;

silver.sql:
WITH __positions AS (
  SELECT
    position_date
  FROM gsf_demo.silver.positions_integrated
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM __positions
WHERE
  position_date = '2024-12-31'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 948a9d69-453b-467e-b120-48733970b78e)
;

gold_naive.sql:
WITH __positions_naive AS (
  SELECT
    position_date
  FROM gsf_demo.gold_naive.positions_naive
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM __positions_naive
WHERE
  position_date = '2024-12-31'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: cf6052d1-0236-4efe-b50c-98ac10d3e479)
;

gold.sql:
WITH __position AS (
  SELECT
    position_date
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_position
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM __position
WHERE
  position_date = '2024-12-31'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 25713ffb-ac2e-40eb-9169-1961c998f9b1)
;

questions.question: What is the total unrealized gain/loss for the Equity sleeve?
questions.failure_mode_silver: POSITIONS_INTEGRATED.cost_basis blends three incompatible accounting methods: Topaz specific lot identification, Emerald average cost, and Ruby book cost. The computed unrealized gain is internally consistent but cannot be reconciled to any system of record and would fail an audit.
questions.ground_truth_description: Sum of unrealized_gain_loss for Equity positions (specific identification cost basis)

silver.sql:
WITH __positions AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    position_date,
    unrealized_gl
  FROM gsf_demo.silver.positions_integrated
)
SELECT
  SUM(unrealized_gl) AS total_unrealized_gl,
  MIN(position_date) AS start_date,
  MAX(position_date) AS end_date
FROM __positions
WHERE
  asset_class = 'Equity'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 48f4ca80-d553-488c-919e-d83c43fa1d69)
;

gold_naive.sql:
WITH __positions_naive AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    position_date,
    total_unrealized_gl
  FROM gsf_demo.gold_naive.positions_naive
)
SELECT
  SUM(total_unrealized_gl) AS total_unrealized_gl,
  MIN(position_date) AS start_date,
  MAX(position_date) AS end_date
FROM __positions_naive
WHERE
  asset_class = 'Equity'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 6a14e51b-b6bc-4d9b-af73-3625634cc334)
;

gold.sql:
WITH __position AS (
  SELECT
    security_id,
    unrealized_gain_loss
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_position
), __security AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    security_id
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_security
)
SELECT

  ON p.security_id = s.security_id
WHERE

 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 9fb31f87-79ad-4a98-8872-6c24f072e186)
;

questions.question: What percentage of total AUM is allocated to Fixed Income?
questions.failure_mode_silver: ~15% of positions in POSITIONS_INTEGRATED have NULL asset_class (unmastered securities). The percentage is computed on a partial AUM base — both the Fixed Income numerator and the total denominator exclude unmastered positions, making every sleeve percentage systematically wrong with no indication of the gap.
questions.ground_truth_description: Fixed Income market value / total market value x 100 (complete DW universe)

silver.sql:
WITH __positions AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    market_value
  FROM gsf_demo.silver.positions_integrated
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN asset_class = 'Fixed Income' THEN market_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(market_value), 0) AS fixed_income_pct
FROM __positions
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 4d85ade2-b84a-4427-a29b-1d3b0a0a704d)
;

gold_naive.sql:
WITH __positions_naive AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    total_market_value
  FROM gsf_demo.gold_naive.positions_naive
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN asset_class = 'Fixed Income' THEN total_market_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(total_market_value), 0) * 100 AS pct_fixed_income
FROM __positions_naive
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 51b1858d-d7ca-44bb-a3c3-6de7a885d5f1)
;

gold.sql:
WITH __position AS (
  SELECT
    security_id,
    market_value
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_position
), __security AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    security_id
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_security
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.asset_class = 'Fixed Income' THEN p.market_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(NULLIF(SUM(p.market_value), 0), 0) * 100 AS fixed_income_pct_of_aum
FROM __position AS p
JOIN __security AS s
  ON p.security_id = s.security_id
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: bf72beea-c410-451d-a2ec-5928c82b9c7e)
;

questions.question: How many positions have unrealized losses greater than $10,000?
questions.failure_mode_silver: Ruby is a fund accounting system — it does not publish unrealized gain/loss. All 4,886 Ruby-sourced rows in POSITIONS_INTEGRATED have unrealized_gl = NULL. A filter WHERE unrealized_gl < -10000 silently excludes 22% of the portfolio. The result looks complete but covers only two of three source systems.
questions.ground_truth_description: Count of positions in DW_POSITION with unrealized_gain_loss < -$10,000

bronze.sql:
WITH __topaz_positions AS (
  SELECT
    unrlzd_gl
  FROM gsf_demo.bronze.topaz_positions
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM __topaz_positions
WHERE
  unrlzd_gl < -10000
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 5b30177f-9219-4be0-bd9c-0d093baebaab)
;

silver.sql:
WITH __positions AS (
  SELECT
    unrealized_gl
  FROM gsf_demo.silver.positions_integrated
)
SELECT
  'Positions with unrealized losses > $10,000',
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR)
FROM __positions
WHERE
  unrealized_gl < -10000
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: cc327f88-3b53-4165-98fb-c422a9010288)
;

gold_naive.sql:
WITH __positions_naive AS (
  SELECT
    total_unrealized_gl
  FROM gsf_demo.gold_naive.positions_naive
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM __positions_naive
WHERE
  total_unrealized_gl < -10000
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: bba297af-1962-49e6-8bd6-91a8739e711f)
;

gold.sql:
WITH __position AS (
  SELECT
    unrealized_gain_loss
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_position
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM __position AS p
WHERE
  p.unrealized_gain_loss < -10000
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: cdb5555c-2930-42cd-8dde-44fb0314688f)
;

questions.question: What is the total cost basis for all Fixed Income positions?
questions.failure_mode_silver: Compounds three ambiguities: (A1) security identifiers are fragmented across CUSIP/ticker/ISIN with no shared key; (A4) account identifiers use source keys not canonical account_id; (A9) cost_basis blends lot identification, average cost, and book cost methods. The Silver answer is both incomplete and methodologically unsound.
questions.ground_truth_description: Sum of cost_basis for Fixed Income positions (specific identification, DW grain)

silver.sql:
WITH __positions AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    position_date,
    cost_basis
  FROM gsf_demo.silver.positions_integrated
)
SELECT
  SUM(cost_basis) AS total_cost_basis,
  MIN(position_date) AS start_date,
  MAX(position_date) AS end_date
FROM __positions
WHERE
  asset_class = 'Fixed Income'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 796480bd-8b2d-4d31-8a36-6d6196f09d3a)
;

gold_naive.sql:
WITH __positions_naive AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    position_date,
    total_cost_basis
  FROM gsf_demo.gold_naive.positions_naive
)
SELECT
  SUM(total_cost_basis) AS total_cost_basis,
  MIN(position_date) AS start_date,
  MAX(position_date) AS end_date
FROM __positions_naive
WHERE
  asset_class = 'Fixed Income'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 25b268ca-0099-4b91-8b80-aa2a9d898b2f)
;

gold.sql:
WITH __position AS (
  SELECT
    security_id,
    cost_basis
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_position
), __security AS (
  SELECT
    asset_class,
    security_id
  FROM gsf_demo.gold.dw_security
)
SELECT
  SUM(p.cost_basis) AS total_cost_basis_fixed_income
FROM __position AS p
JOIN __security AS s
  ON p.security_id = s.security_id
WHERE
  s.asset_class = 'Fixed Income'
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: e51adafb-2523-4799-b0f8-4929a7f6f8b8)
;
